argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const ops = ['HomeTimeline', 'HomeLatestTimeline']; const fallbacks = { HomeTimeline: '0Q7Duc1hJgZkVNZrHeJOXw', HomeLatestTimeline: 'BKB7oi212Fi7kQtCBGE4zA' }; let scripts = performance.getEntriesByType('resource').filter(r => r.name.includes('client-web') && r.name.endsWith('.js')).map(r => r.name); if (scripts.length < 5) { for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); scripts = performance.getEntriesByType('resource').filter(r => r.name.includes('client-web') && r.name.endsWith('.js')).map(r => r.name); if (scripts.length >= 5) break; } } const queryIds = {}; for (const op of ops) { queryIds[op] = fallbacks[op]; for (const scriptUrl of scripts.slice(0, 30)) { try { const text = await (await fetch(scriptUrl)).text(); const re = new RegExp('queryId:"([A-Za-z0-9_-]+)"[^}]{0,200}operationName:"' + op + '"'); const match = text.match(re); if (match) { queryIds[op] = match[1]; break; } } catch {} } } return { queryIds }; }

async (intermediate) => { const qids = intermediate.queryIds || {}; const type = '{{ type }}' === 'following' ? 'following' : 'for-you'; const limit = {{ limit }} || 20; const ct0 = document.cookie.split(';').map(c=>c.trim()).find(c=>c.startsWith('ct0='))?.split('=')[1]; if (!ct0) return { error: 'Not logged into x.com (no ct0 cookie)' }; const bearer = 'AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAANRILgAAAAAAnNwIzUejRCOuH5E6I8xnZz4puTs%3D1Zv7ttfk8LF81IUq16cHjhLTvJu4FA33AGWWjCpTnA'; const headers = { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + decodeURIComponent(bearer), 'X-Csrf-Token': ct0, 'X-Twitter-Auth-Type': 'OAuth2Session', 'X-Twitter-Active-User': 'yes' }; const endpoint = type === 'following' ? 'HomeLatestTimeline' : 'HomeTimeline'; const method = type === 'following' ? 'POST' : 'GET'; const queryId = type === 'following' ? qids.HomeLatestTimeline : qids.HomeTimeline; const features = JSON.stringify({ rweb_video_screen_enabled: false, profile_label_improvements_pcf_label_in_post_enabled: true, rweb_tipjar_consumption_enabled: true, verified_phone_label_enabled: false, creator_subscriptions_tweet_preview_api_enabled: true, responsive_web_graphql_timeline_navigation_enabled: true, responsive_web_graphql_skip_user_profile_image_extensions_enabled: false, premium_content_api_read_enabled: false, communities_web_enable_tweet_community_results_fetch: true, c9s_tweet_anatomy_moderator_badge_enabled: true, responsive_web_grok_analyze_button_fetch_trends_enabled: false, responsive_web_grok_analyze_post_followups_enabled: true, responsive_web_jetfuel_frame: false, responsive_web_grok_share_attachment_enabled: true, articles_preview_enabled: true, responsive_web_edit_tweet_api_enabled: true, graphql_is_translatable_rweb_tweet_is_translatable_enabled: true, view_counts_everywhere_api_enabled: true, longform_notetweets_consumption_enabled: true, responsive_web_twitter_article_tweet_consumption_enabled: true, tweet_awards_web_tipping_enabled: false, responsive_web_grok_show_grok_translated_post: false, responsive_web_grok_analysis_button_from_backend: false, creator_subscriptions_quote_tweet_preview_enabled: false, freedom_of_speech_not_reach_fetch_enabled: true, standardized_nudges_misinfo: true, tweet_with_visibility_results_prefer_gql_limited_actions_policy_enabled: true, longform_notetweets_rich_text_read_enabled: true, longform_notetweets_inline_media_enabled: true, responsive_web_grok_image_annotation_enabled: true, responsive_web_enhance_cards_enabled: false }); const vars = { count: limit, includePromotedContent: false, latestControlAvailable: true, requestContext: 'launch' }; if (type === 'for-you') vars.withCommunity = true; if (type === 'following') vars.seenTweetIds = []; const url = '/i/api/graphql/' + queryId + '/' + endpoint + '?variables=' + encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(vars)) + '&features=' + encodeURIComponent(features); const resp = await fetch(url, { method, headers, credentials: 'include' }); if (!resp.ok) return { error: 'HTTP ' + resp.status }; const d = await resp.json(); const tweets = []; const seen = new Set(); const instructions = d?.data?.home?.home_timeline_urt?.instructions || []; for (const inst of instructions) { for (const entry of inst.entries || []) { const c = entry.content; if (c?.entryType === 'TimelineTimelineCursor' || c?.__typename === 'TimelineTimelineCursor') continue; if (entry.entryId?.startsWith('cursor-bottom-')) continue; const tweetResult = c?.itemContent?.tweet_results?.result; if (tweetResult) { if (c?.itemContent?.promotedMetadata) continue; const tw = tweetResult.tweet || tweetResult; if (!tw.rest_id || seen.has(tw.rest_id)) continue; seen.add(tw.rest_id); const l = tw.legacy || {}; const u = tw.core?.user_results?.result; const screenName = u?.legacy?.screen_name || u?.core?.screen_name || 'unknown'; const noteText = tw.note_tweet?.note_tweet_results?.result?.text; const views = tw.views?.count ? parseInt(tw.views.count, 10) : 0; tweets.push({ id: tw.rest_id, author: screenName, text: noteText || l.full_text || '', likes: l.favorite_count || 0, retweets: l.retweet_count || 0, replies: l.reply_count || 0, views, created_at: l.created_at || '', url: 'https://x.com/' + screenName + '/status/' + tw.rest_id }); continue; } for (const item of c?.items || []) { const nested = item.item?.itemContent?.tweet_results?.result; if (nested) { if (item.item?.itemContent?.promotedMetadata) continue; const tw = nested.tweet || nested; if (!tw.rest_id || seen.has(tw.rest_id)) continue; seen.add(tw.rest_id); const l = tw.legacy || {}; const u = tw.core?.user_results?.result; const screenName = u?.legacy?.screen_name || u?.core?.screen_name || 'unknown'; const noteText = tw.note_tweet?.note_tweet_results?.result?.text; const views = tw.views?.count ? parseInt(tw.views.count, 10) : 0; tweets.push({ id: tw.rest_id, author: screenName, text: noteText || l.full_text || '', likes: l.favorite_count || 0, retweets: l.retweet_count || 0, replies: l.reply_count || 0, views, created_at: l.created_at || '', url: 'https://x.com/' + screenName + '/status/' + tw.rest_id }); } } } } return { tweets: tweets.slice(0, limit) }; }

async (intermediate) => { if (intermediate.error) return [{ id: '', author: '', text: '', likes: 0, retweets: 0, replies: 0, views: 0, created_at: '', url: '', error: intermediate.error }]; return intermediate.tweets || []; }
